text:
VERDICT: LIKELY
EXPLANATION: The paper exists and is real (published at MICCAI 2023, not NeurIPS), but the cited authors (H. Wang, X. Li, Q. Zhang) are completely fabricated — the actual authors are Hu Wang, Congbo Ma, Jianpeng Zhang, Yuan Zhang, Jodie Avery, Louise Hull, and Gustavo Carneiro. None of the cited co-authors (X. Li, Q. Zhang) appear on the real paper, making this a classic grafted reference with a real title but entirely wrong author list.
LINK: https://arxiv.org/abs/2310.01035
